function.message: I can’t fully complete this inbox request because the inbox asks for OCR of five files, but only four corresponding purchase records are present and readable. I made no edits to avoid partial completion.
function.rulebook_notes: Per inbox-processing workflow, if task is not doable, do not leave partial edits; process-next workflow says stop with clarification when canonical support is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request file specifies five OCR targets, but direct reads succeeded for only four finance records and a direct read of the fifth target failed as not found; a follow-up workspace find also returned no match. Completing only four would be a partial result, which the workflow disallows.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of fifth requested file (not found)
